use_cases: Displaying partner or client logos as social proof on landing pages
Building trust by showcasing familiar brand names and collaborations
Adding credibility to a website in a hero or footer section
Creating a professional partner showcase section for business websites
ai_summary: A logo cloud component that displays partner and company logos in a responsive flex-wrap layout with dark mode support. The component uses Tailwind CSS for styling and includes the dark:invert class for seamless dark mode adaptation. It's designed as a social proof element to build credibility by showcasing familiar brand partnerships across industries.
